diagrams.title: Number Line Visualization of > and <
diagrams.description: Shows how > and < work on a number line, with the operator pointing to the larger/smaller value
diagrams.purpose: Visualize directional meaning of greater than and less than operators

diagrams.title: == vs equals() Comparison
diagrams.description: Memory model showing how == compares references while equals() compares object content
diagrams.purpose: Understand the fundamental difference between reference and content comparison

diagrams.title: Truth Table for All Relational Operators
diagrams.description: Complete truth table showing results for all 6 operators with sample values
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for operator behavior with different values

diagrams.title: Short-Circuit Evaluation Flowchart
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing how && and || short-circuit based on first condition
diagrams.purpose: Understand optimization in logical expressions with relational operators
